condition: clinical result, FDA/EMA expectation, medical AI paper, CDMO capacity, GLP-1 TAM, biosimilar approval expectation, or device launch only
example: Pre-revenue biotech, AI drug platform, medical-AI AUC paper, or GLP-1 TAM headline.

condition: approval, PBM/formulary, contract or facility acquisition, procedure growth, external validation, pricing, launch plan, or initial stock reaction
example: Lilly Foundayo approval, Samsung Biologics Rockville facility, Cigna Humira biosimilar $0 copay, or Lunit DBT validation.

condition: prescriptions, insurance/reimbursement, commercial revenue, OPM/FCF, procedure growth plus consumables, repeat CDMO contracts, utilization, and aligned price path
example: Intuitive Surgical procedure growth plus instruments/accessories revenue and guidance raise.

condition: GLP-1, surgical robot, CDMO, medical AI, or biosimilar consensus is crowded and valuation moves before scripts or FCF
example: GLP-1 mega-TAM or medtech platform premium before gross-to-net, scripts, procedure mix, and FCF remain confirmed.

condition: sales/profit decline warning, price war, compounded crackdown, cash crunch, discounted take-private, forecast cut, impairment, patent litigation, counterfeit or safety warning
example: Novo price-war warning, Hims compounded GLP-1 crackdown, bluebird cash crunch, Charles River forecast cut, Teladoc impairment, or Botox counterfeit warning.
